name: Bug report
about: Create a report to help us improve

* [ ] Have u googled the problem? If no, pls do that first!

### Environment

* [x] Linux
   * [x] CentOS 7
   * [x] Fedora
   * [x] Ubuntu 16.04 +
   * [x] Debian 9 +
* [x] macOS
* [x] Windows 10
* [x] Raspberry Pi (ARM)
* [x] Others (Pls describe below)

### Docker Version

<!--如果你的 Docker 版本低於 20.10 請儘可能升級到該版本，保留你的 Docker 版本，其他選項刪除-->
<!--if Docker version under 20.10, please upgrade Docker to 20.10-->

* [x] Test (v20.10)
* [x] Stable (v20.10)
* [x] 1.13.0 or Before

### Problem Description

<!--描述你的問題，請貼出操作步驟，終端報錯截圖或文字資訊-->
